originalAlarm.description: `scontext` could be null (null value originating from line 7) and is dereferenced.

model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_STAT_FORMAT () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_SELINUX () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 14 has '// ERROR' — known VBDB bug. scontext is set to NULL at L7 (inside #ifdef SELINUX). L14 dereferences *scontext — null dereference. Requires SELINUX=T (for scontext declaration and code block L12-15) AND STAT_FORMAT=F (for the outer #ifndef block L10-18 to be compiled). PC = SELINUX=T AND STAT_FORMAT=F exactly matches. Classification: TRUE.
